summary: Comprehensive testing completed for ORSO RS conciergerie website. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate) and frontend UI/UX working excellently with minor improvements needed.

design_issues.issue: Language switcher works but could be more prominently displayed for better UX

passed_tests: Backend API health endpoints (18/18 tests passed)
Booking system with price quotes and reservations
Contact form submission with email integration
Homepage load with hero, search bar, categories
Property detail pages with booking widgets
Complete booking flow from search to confirmation

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor UX improvements possible)
